text: Nuno Felix Genius you moron…. genius…. As I’ve said since January, this has been an obvious option. And preferred (in my view) to putting a landing force at risk. If the rumpers want to respond kinetically, we are locked and loaded. - Richard Goldberg tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 天才，你这个笨蛋……天才……正如我从一月份所说的那样，这是一个显而易见的选项。而且（在我看来）比让登陆部队冒险更可取。如果那些强硬派想要进行军事回应，我们已经做好了准备。 - Richard Goldberg 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump compares UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer to Neville Chamberlain. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043346139731116067/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普将英国首相基尔·斯塔默比作内维尔·张伯伦。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043346139731116067/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian journalist Ali Golaki, close to the IRGC: Trump’s move could drive up prices across Gulf states, especially for goods moving through regional ports, but says the U.S. won’t sustain it beyond 2 months as global costs rise and rivals gain strength. He adds Trump is shifting the narrative from failing to open the Strait to claiming he closed it, and warns Iran could quickly shut Bab al-Mandab as part of an escalation toward a ceasefire. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 与伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队关系密切的伊朗记者阿里·戈拉基（Ali Golaki）：特朗普的举动可能会推高海湾国家的物价，尤其是通过地区港口的货物价格，但他表示，随着全球成本上升和竞争对手实力增强，美国无法维持超过2个月。他补充说，特朗普正在改变叙事，从未能开放海峡转变为声称他关闭了海峡，并警告称，作为升级停火行动的一部分，伊朗可能会迅速关闭曼德海峡。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🗣️ “We are very disappointed with NATO — very, very disappointed that they didn’t come. Now they want to come and help with the Strait of Hormuz, but it won’t take long to ‘clear’ it. We will clear the strait, and they will be able to use it again very soon.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🗣️ “我们对北约非常失望——非常、非常失望，因为他们没有来。现在他们想来帮助霍尔木兹海峡，但‘清理’它不会花太长时间。我们将清理海峡，他们很快就能再次使用它。” 与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel A U.S. Air Force KC-135R Stratotanker damaged in an Iranian ballistic missile strike on Prince Sultan Air Base has arrived at RAF Mildenhall for repairs. The aircraft shows visible shrapnel damage across its airframe. During the attack, the U.S. Air Force lost two KC-135Rs, one KC-46A Pegasus, and one E-3G Sentry at the base. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 一架在美国对苏丹王子空军基地发动的伊朗弹道导弹袭击中受损的美国空军 KC-135R 同温层加油机已抵达英国米尔登霍尔皇家空军基地进行维修。该飞机机身上有明显的弹片损伤。在袭击中，美国空军在该基地损失了两架 KC-135R、一架 KC-46A 飞马座加油机和一架 E-3G 哨兵预警机。推文

text: Nuno Felix This is important. Keep our cool and let it ride With Hungarian elections, better to wait and see what the exact results are and how the population as well as state elites respond to them before flinging out any hot takes - Alexander Clarkson  tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 这很重要。保持冷静，顺其自然。随着匈牙利选举的临近，最好先看看确切的结果，以及民众和国家精英们如何回应，然后再发表任何激进的言论 - Alexander Clarkson  推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Donald Trump on Iran: 🗣️ “They came in acting like they had the cards — but they don’t have any.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043344548391239912/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 唐纳德·特朗普谈伊朗： 🗣️ “他们进来时表现得好像他们手里有牌——但他们什么都没有。” 与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043344548391239912/video/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix Quantity my ace, quantity…. The Emiratis and the Saudis can bypass the Straits of Hormuz to sell their oil The Iranians can’t. - Will Chamberlain tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 数量，我的王牌，数量……阿联酋人和沙特人可以绕过霍尔木兹海峡出售他们的石油，而伊朗人不能。 - Will Chamberlain 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: We're putting on a complete blockade. We're not going to let Iran make money on selling oil to people that they like and not people that they don't like or whatever it is. It's going to be all or none https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043344200171704531/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：我们正在实施全面封锁。我们不会让伊朗通过向他们喜欢的人而不是他们不喜欢的人出售石油来赚钱，或者诸如此类的事情。要么全有，要么全无 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043344200171704531/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: They have no anti-aircraft. We fly over there at will, can take out anything we want. As you know last week I said we're going to strongly consider knocking out their power plants and the rest of their bridges. We took down their big bridge. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043343462494306408/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：他们没有防空系统。我们可以随意飞越那里，可以摧毁任何我们想要的东西。如你所知，上周我说过，我们将认真考虑摧毁他们的发电厂和其余的桥梁。我们摧毁了他们的大桥。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043343462494306408/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Ukraine’s General Staff says Russia keeps breaking the Easter truce, with 55 attacks recorded by 16:00 on April 12. It’s the second straight day they ignore the ceasefire. Ukraine’s General Staff says Russia racked up 2,299 ceasefire violations from 4 pm to 7 am, including 28 assaults, 479 shelling incidents and 1,792 Lancet, Molniya and FPV strikes. No missiles, glide bombs or Shaheds. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043228142857269491/photo/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 乌克兰总参谋部表示，俄罗斯一直在破坏复活节停火协议，截至4月12日16:00，已记录到55次袭击。这是他们连续第二天无视停火协议。乌克兰总参谋部称，从下午4点到早上7点，俄罗斯违反停火协议2,299次，包括28次突击、479次炮击和1,792次“柳叶刀”、“闪电”和FPV无人机袭击。没有导弹、滑翔炸弹或“沙赫德”无人机。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043228142857269491/photo/1 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Open Source Intel Advisor to Iran’s supreme leader Ali Akbar Velayati: “Key to Strait of Hormuz in Iran’s capable hands” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043342975682388458/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗最高领袖顾问阿里·阿克巴尔·韦拉亚蒂：“霍尔木兹海峡的钥匙掌握在伊朗有能力的手中” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043342975682388458/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: When you look at CNN, "The New York Times," ABC fake news, NBC fake news, they report things that they know are false. It's almost treasonous. The NYT’s circulation is way down. I’m proud to report that. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043342956111790536/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：当你看到 CNN、《纽约时报》、ABC 假新闻、NBC 假新闻时，他们报道的事情他们自己都知道是假的。这几乎是叛国。《纽约时报》的发行量大幅下降。我很自豪能报告这一点。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043342956111790536/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump has told Fox News that the UK and a number of other nations are set to send minesweepers to aid in securing the Strait of Hormuz, following his announcement that the U.S. will blockade the strait and interdict all vessels that pay a toll to Iran for safe transit. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普告诉福克斯新闻，英国和其他一些国家准备派遣扫雷舰协助确保霍尔木兹海峡的安全，此前他宣布美国将封锁该海峡并拦截所有向伊朗支付通行费以求安全通过的船只。推文

text: Open Source Intel Bartiromo: You were criticized because you said a whole civilization will die…. Trump: I’m fine with it because it brought them to the table. For years, I’ve had to hear them say death to America. We’ve had regime change. When I say about a civilization, it really has changed. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043342362202546598/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel Bartiromo：你因为说整个文明将会消亡而受到批评……特朗普：我对此没意见，因为它让他们坐到了谈判桌前。多年来，我不得不听他们说“打倒美国”。我们已经实现了政权更迭。当我谈论一个文明时，它确实已经改变了。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043342362202546598/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: I could take out Iran in one day. I took out a bridge just to show them because they came out with a statement. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043341809942720806/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：我可以在一天内消灭伊朗。我摧毁了一座桥只是为了向他们展示，因为他们发表了一份声明。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043341809942720806/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel President Trump blasts NATO after some European leaders said Iran “isn’t our war,” warning: “Think of it… after we’ve spent $350 billion, they make that statement. We have to reexamine NATO. They weren’t there for us… and they won’t be there for us.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043341709065502749/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普总统在一些欧洲领导人表示伊朗“不是我们的战争”后抨击北约，警告说：“想想看……在我们花费了3500亿美元之后，他们发表了那样的声明。我们必须重新审视北约。他们没有为我们挺身而出……而且他们也不会为我们挺身而出。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043341709065502749/video/1 推文

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ $1.5 Trillion for Bombs while America’s needs go unmet
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 1.5万亿美元用于制造炸弹，而美国的需求却得不到满足

text: Open Source Intel President Trump says, "I could take out Iran in one day. One hour." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043341147611775084/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普总统说：“我可以在一天内消灭伊朗。一小时。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043341147611775084/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel President Trump on news reports that China is preparing to ship weapons to Iran: "I doubt they would do that... but if we catch them doing that, they get a 50% tariff, which is a staggering amount." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043340813703262357/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普总统谈到有关中国准备向伊朗运送武器的新闻报道时说：“我怀疑他们会这样做……但如果我们抓到他们这样做，他们将面临50%的关税，这是一个惊人的数字。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043340813703262357/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Bartiromo: Is this going to be enough, the blockade in this strait, the opening up of capacity in the US, to lower the price of oil and gas? Trump: It might not happen initially…Gas hasn't gone up as much as I thought. But regardless, even if it did, we have to stop this group of people tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel Bartiromo：这个海峡的封锁，加上美国产能的释放，足以降低石油和天然气的价格吗？特朗普：起初可能不会发生……天然气价格并没有像我想象的那样上涨。但无论如何，即使上涨了，我们也必须阻止这群人。推文

text: 🇮🇷 A source close to the negotiation team: The interview attributed to Araghchi, the Foreign Minister, about the negotiations, which has been circulating since this morning on some Persian and English social networks, is completely fabricated and he has not given any interview to the media.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 谈判团队的一位消息人士：今天早上在一些波斯语和英语社交网络上流传的关于谈判的、归因于外交部长阿拉格齐的采访完全是捏造的，他没有接受任何媒体的采访。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 "Look at the Israeli relationship, look at the incredible partnership we have. As Bibi Netanyahu said, we’re the big brother and Israel is the little brother." - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 “看看以色列的关系，看看我们拥有的令人难以置信的伙伴关系。正如比比·内塔尼亚胡所说，我们是大哥，以色列是小弟。” - 特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: We can cut off their electricity for 10 years.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们可以切断他们的电力10年。

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "‘I could take out Iran in one day. One hour.’" فَقَالَ أَنَا رَبُّكُمُ الْأَعْلَىٰ (24) فَأَخَذَهُ اللَّهُ نَكَالَ الْآخِرَةِ وَالْأُولَىٰ (25) إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبْرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰ (26) أَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَمِ السَّمَاءُ ۚ بَنَاهَا (27) رَفَعَ سَمْكَهَا فَسَوَّاهَا (28) وَأَغْطَشَ لَيْلَهَا وَأَخْرَجَ ضُحَاهَا (29) وَالْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ دَحَاهَا (30) أَخْرَجَ مِنْهَا مَاءَهَا وَمَرْعَاهَا (31) وَالْجِبَالَ أَرْسَاهَا (32) مَتَاعًا لَّكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَامِكُمْ
text_zh: ↩️ 回复黎巴嫩新闻与更新：“‘我可以在一天内消灭伊朗。一小时。’”（古兰经文引用）

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 The high-ranking delegation of the Islamic Republic of Iran, left Islamabad a few hours ago heading to Iran.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗伊斯兰共和国高级代表团几小时前离开伊斯兰堡前往伊朗。

text: Trump: We can cut off their electricity for 10 years.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们可以切断他们的电力10年。

text: 🇺🇸 "NATO is shameful" - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “北约是可耻的” - 特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇪🇺 U.S. President Trump called NATO “shameful”, saying allies were not there for the United States during the war with Iran. He singled out UK Prime Minister Starmer for saying Britain would send equipment after the war: “That’s a Neville Chamberlain…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said the US has “wiped out their whole country, essentially”, adding that the only remaining targets in Iran are water desalination plants, electric generating plants, bridges and some missile manufacturing facilities. “We could hit them. We could have them all down. You couldn’t have electricity for ten years,” he said. “When you talk about maximum, I think I pretty much maxed out.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇪🇺 美国总统特朗普称北约“可耻”，称盟友在与伊朗的战争期间没有为美国挺身而出。他特别指出英国首相斯塔默说英国会在战后派遣装备：“那是一个内维尔·张伯伦……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，美国已经“基本上消灭了他们的整个国家”，并补充说，伊朗仅存的目标是海水淡化厂、发电厂、桥梁和一些导弹制造设施。“我们可以打击他们。我们可以让他们全部瘫痪。你将十年没有电，”他说。“当谈到最大程度时，我想我已经基本上做到了最大程度。” @wfwitness

text: Maria Bartiromo: Do you believe the price of oil and gas will be lower before the midterm elections? Trump: It could be the same or a little bit higher; it should be around the same.
text_zh: Maria Bartiromo：你认为石油和天然气的价格会在中期选举前降低吗？特朗普：可能会保持不变或稍微高一点；应该差不多。

text: 🇺🇸 "I hear news reports about China giving the shoulder missiles. I doubt they would do that because I have a relationship and I think they wouldn't do that, but maybe they did a little bit at the beginning, but I don't think they would anymore. But if we catch them doing that they get a 50% tariff." - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “我听到有关中国提供肩扛式导弹的新闻报道。我怀疑他们会这样做，因为我有这种关系，我认为他们不会这样做，但也许他们在开始时做了一点，但我认为他们不会再这样做了。但如果我们抓到他们这样做，他们将面临50%的关税。” - 特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump on NATO: We have to reexamine NATO. They weren't there for us. They won't be there for us. This is just a military operation, not a hard thing for us.
text_zh: 特朗普谈北约：我们必须重新审视北约。他们没有为我们挺身而出。他们不会为我们挺身而出。这只是一次军事行动，对我们来说不是什么难事。

text: Trump compares Keir Starmer to Neville Chamberlain.
text_zh: 特朗普将基尔·斯塔默比作内维尔·张伯伦。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇪 U.S. President Trump said he rebuilt the US military in his first term and is now using it in his second term. “We have the greatest military anywhere in the world. We have the greatest equipment in the world.” He also noted that Venezuela is making…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 U.S. President Trump called NATO “shameful”, saying allies were not there for the United States during the war with Iran. He singled out UK Prime Minister Starmer for saying Britain would send equipment after the war: “That’s a Neville Chamberlain type of statement.” He also criticised Germany for saying it didn’t start the war. “Now we have to reexamine NATO because they weren’t there for us,” Trump said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇪 美国总统特朗普表示，他在第一个任期内重建了美国军队，现在正在第二个任期内使用它。“我们拥有世界上任何地方最强大的军队。我们拥有世界上最伟大的装备。”他还指出，委内瑞拉正在……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 美国总统特朗普称北约“可耻”，称盟友在与伊朗的战争期间没有为美国挺身而出。他特别指出英国首相斯塔默说英国会在战后派遣装备：“那是一种内维尔·张伯伦式的声明。”他还批评德国说它没有发动战争。“现在我们必须重新审视北约，因为他们没有为我们挺身而出，”特朗普说。 @wfwitness

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 President Trump: ‘I could take out Iran in one day. One hour.’ @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 特朗普总统：‘我可以在一天内消灭伊朗。一小时。’ @Middle_East_Spectator

text: Trump: Chinese cars are destroying Europe because they are taking away business from Mercedes and BMW. We don’t have any Chinese cars in our country.
text_zh: 特朗普：中国汽车正在摧毁欧洲，因为它们抢走了梅赛德斯和宝马的生意。我们国家没有任何中国汽车。

text: Trump: Chinese cars are destroying Europe because they are taking away business from Mercedes and BMW. We don’t have any Chinese cars in our country.
text_zh: 特朗普：中国汽车正在摧毁欧洲，因为它们抢走了梅赛德斯和宝马的生意。我们国家没有任何中国汽车。

text: Trump on NATO countries: Could I have forced them to participate? Maybe. But if they had come in, it would have been grudgingly. They would have stayed behind.
text_zh: 特朗普谈北约国家：我能强迫他们参与吗？也许。但如果他们进来了，那也是勉强的。他们会留在后面。

text: Maria Bartiromo: You said the other day that any country that supports Iran or sends military equipment to Iran would face a 50% tariff on their products. Were you referring to China? Trump: Yes, China and potentially others. But specifically, yes, China is included. I’ve heard reports — and I don’t always trust news reports — claiming that China giving shoulder-fired anti-aircraft missiles. I’m not sure that’s accurate. I doubt they would do that. Maybe they did a little bit at the beginning. But if we catch any country, including China, providing military equipment to Iran, they will face a 50% tariff.
text_zh: Maria Bartiromo：你前几天说任何支持伊朗或向伊朗运送军事装备的国家都将面临其产品50%的关税。你指的是中国吗？特朗普：是的，中国以及潜在的其他国家。但具体来说，是的，中国包括在内。我听到过报道——我并不总是相信新闻报道——声称中国提供肩扛式防空导弹。我不确定这是否准确。我怀疑他们会这样做。也许他们在开始时做了一点。但如果我们抓到任何国家，包括中国，向伊朗提供军事装备，他们将面临50%的关税。

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "Trump:The Strait is critical for Japan — they get about 93% of their oil through it. South Korea gets roughly 45%. Yet these countries haven’t really helped us.I ask them: are you going to help?We have about 45,000 U.S. troops in Japan and about 50,000 in South Korea. We guard them and protect them. But when we ask for a little help in return, they don’t help us." Imagine after all what he did and all what he can do and all the power under his command and the Israelis and he still talks about help Know what exactly that is for? Not for military means which he possess enough off to do anything he wants but? For the legitimacy of war and action that he is looking for and can't secure because no one is helping supporting his fully And found out he's only working with the small bastard nation of Israel, a pariah for the past few years.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“特朗普：海峡对日本至关重要——他们约93%的石油通过该海峡。韩国约45%。然而这些国家并没有真正帮助我们。我问他们：你们会帮忙吗？我们在日本有大约45,000名美军，在韩国有大约50,000名。我们守卫并保护他们。但当我们要求一点回报时，他们不帮助我们。” 想象一下，在他所做的一切、他所能做的一切以及他指挥下的所有力量之后，以色列人和他仍然在谈论帮助。知道这到底是为了什么吗？不是为了他拥有足够多可以做任何他想做的事情的军事手段，而是为了他正在寻求且无法确保的战争和行动的合法性，因为没有人全力支持他。并发现他只与那个卑鄙的小国以色列合作，一个过去几年里的贱民。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said that if China supplies military equipment to Iran, including shoulder‑fired anti‑aircraft missiles, it would face a 50% tariff on its products. “If we catch them doing that, they get a 50% tariff, which is a staggering…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 U.S. President Trump said he rebuilt the US military in his first term and is now using it in his second term. “We have the greatest military anywhere in the world. We have the greatest equipment in the world.” He also noted that Venezuela is making more money than ever before and that the United States is participating in those profits. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，如果中国向伊朗提供军事装备，包括肩扛式防空导弹，其产品将面临50%的关税。“如果我们抓到他们这样做，他们将面临50%的关税，这是一个惊人的……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 美国总统特朗普表示，他在第一个任期内重建了美国军队，现在正在第二个任期内使用它。“我们拥有世界上任何地方最强大的军队。我们拥有世界上最伟大的装备。”他还指出，委内瑞拉赚的钱比以往任何时候都多，而美国正在分享这些利润。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱 Two empty crude tankers attempted to make their way through the Strait of Hormuz and into the Persian Gulf on Sunday, only to make last-minute U-turns just as peace negotiations between the US and Iran broke down. The tankers, Agios Fanourios I and…" 🇮🇷 2 more oil tankers have turned back from the Strait of Hormuz - Fars Pakistani-flagged tankers “Khairpur” and “Shalamar,” reported earlier to be heading toward the strait, have made a 180-degree turn and are now returning.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇮🇷⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱 两艘空油轮周日试图穿过霍尔木兹海峡进入波斯湾，但就在美伊和平谈判破裂时，它们在最后一刻掉头。这些油轮，Agios Fanourios I 和……” 🇮🇷 另有2艘油轮从霍尔木兹海峡折返 - 法尔斯通讯社报道，早些时候据报道正驶向海峡的悬挂巴基斯坦国旗的油轮“Khairpur”号和“Shalamar”号已经进行了180度大转弯，目前正在返回。

text: 🇺🇸 "I was thinking about calling it the Gulf of Trump, and I decided not to do it." - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “我曾考虑将其命名为特朗普湾，但我决定不这样做。” - 特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳 U.S. President Trump said China can send its ships to the United States or to Venezuela. “We told them, buy from Venezuela. We have a lot of overcapacity, we’d sell them, and we’ll probably sell it for even less money.” Trump added that he has a…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said that if China supplies military equipment to Iran, including shoulder‑fired anti‑aircraft missiles, it would face a 50% tariff on its products. “If we catch them doing that, they get a 50% tariff, which is a staggering amount,” he said. Trump added that he doubts China would do so because of his relationship with President Xi. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳 美国总统特朗普表示，中国可以将其船只派往美国或委内瑞拉。“我们告诉他们，从委内瑞拉购买。我们有大量的过剩产能，我们会卖给他们，而且我们可能会以更低的价格出售。”特朗普补充说，他有……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，如果中国向伊朗提供军事装备，包括肩扛式防空导弹，其产品将面临50%的关税。“如果我们抓到他们这样做，他们将面临50%的关税，这是一个惊人的数字，”他说。特朗普补充说，由于他与习近平主席的关系，他怀疑中国会这样做。 @wfwitness

text: Trump on gas and oil prices: Eventually, prices will go down. It may not happen immediately, but once this situation is resolved, prices will fall. If you want to see the stock market collapse, let a couple of nuclear bombs be used — whether against us or anywhere else.
text_zh: 特朗普谈天然气和石油价格：最终，价格会下降。这可能不会立即发生，但一旦这种情况得到解决，价格就会下跌。如果你想看到股市崩盘，那就让几枚核弹被使用吧——无论是针对我们还是其他任何地方。

text: Journalist Jad Ghosn: "There are Lebanese political parties who wouldn't mind even a slight loss of land if Israel gets rid of Hezbullah for them..."
text_zh: 记者 Jad Ghosn：“有些黎巴嫩政党甚至不介意失去一点土地，如果以色列能为他们除掉真主党的话……”

text: Trump: The Strait is critical for Japan — they get about 93% of their oil through it. South Korea gets roughly 45%. Yet these countries haven’t really helped us. I ask them: are you going to help? We have about 45,000 U.S. troops in Japan and about 50,000 in South Korea. We guard them and protect them. But when we ask for a little help in return, they don’t help us.
text_zh: 特朗普：海峡对日本至关重要——他们约93%的石油通过该海峡。韩国约45%。然而这些国家并没有真正帮助我们。我问他们：你们会帮忙吗？我们在日本有大约45,000名美军，在韩国有大约50,000名。我们守卫并保护他们。但当我们要求一点回报时，他们不帮助我们。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said the United States must stop Iran from obtaining a nuclear weapon. “You want to see a stock market go down? Let a couple of nuclear bombs be dropped on us, or frankly, any place else,” he warned. He noted that the stock market…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 U.S. President Trump said China can send its ships to the United States or to Venezuela. “We told them, buy from Venezuela. We have a lot of overcapacity, we’d sell them, and we’ll probably sell it for even less money.” Trump added that he has a very good relationship with President Xi and that “they’re paying us substantial money – we’ve never got money before.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，美国必须阻止伊朗获得核武器。“你想看到股市下跌吗？让几枚核弹投在我们身上，或者坦率地说，投在任何其他地方，”他警告说。他指出，股市……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 美国总统特朗普表示，中国可以将其船只派往美国或委内瑞拉。“我们告诉他们，从委内瑞拉购买。我们有大量的过剩产能，我们会卖给他们，而且我们可能会以更低的价格出售。”特朗普补充说，他与习近平主席关系非常好，而且“他们正在支付给我们大量的钱——我们以前从未得到过钱。” @wfwitness
